case_title: PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR DBA THE MARILYN INN vs. DAVIE, SARAH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR DBA THE MARILYN INN AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIE, SARAH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR DBA THE MARILYN INN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIE, SARAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 27 DASHIELL HAMMET, ROOM NO.30, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR DBA THE MARILYN INN AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIE, SARAH SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR DBA THE MARILYN INN SERVED APR-26-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIE, SARAH
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $17.80 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NARENDRAKUMAR DBA THE MARILYN INN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIE, SARAH
